name: plano-contas-iob
description: API multi-tenant CNPJ x Plano de Contas - IOB SAGE

do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && node scripts/check-duplicate-routes.js && node scripts/test-auditai-gemini-route-order.js && npm run test:layouts && npm run test:bb && npm run test:bb-cash && npm run test:itau && npm run test:itau-fatura && npm run test:safra && npm run test:caixa && npm run test:c6 && npm run test:abc && npm run test:btg && npm run test:flanacar && npm run test:clude-itau && npm run test:clude-layouts && npm run test:clude-servicos && npm run test:santander && npm run test:bradesco && npm run test:bradesco-ocr && npm run test:bradesco-simples && npm run test:ofx && npm run test:auditai-itau && npm run test:auditai-rol && npm run test:product-quality && npm run test:version-popup && npm run test:quality-gate && npm run test:session-import-version && npm run test:reinf-aluguel && npm run test:reinf-dividendos && npm run test:reinf-aplicacoes && npm run test:reinf-assinatura && npm run test:validador-obrigacoes && npm run test:ecdecf-igreja && npm run test:igrejas-caixa && npm run test:mercadopago && npm run test:xlsx-bank-isolation && npm run test:extrato-conciliado && npm run test:admin-exclusao
